Sandbox_ApocalipseBRRadio_KeepRadioAlive: Prevents radio silence after vanilla transmissions end. Custom transmissions will continue broadcasting indefinitely.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBRRadio_TransmissionIn: Average game minutes between custom radio transmissions. Lower = more frequent broadcasts. Default: 5.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBRRadio_EnableEmergenc: Enable the Emergency Broadcast System channel (91.6 MHz) with government warnings and evacuation notices.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBRRadio_EnableCreepyTr: Enable the Ghost Radio channel (66.6 MHz) with eerie, unsettling, and creepypasta-style transmissions.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBRRadio_EnableRadioApo: Enable the main Radio Apocalipse channel (104.2 MHz) with survivor broadcasts and community news.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBRRadio_EnableMilitary: Enable the Military Communications channel (310 kHz) with tactical and classified transmissions.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBRRadio_EnableNumbersS: Enable the mysterious Numbers Station (47.8 MHz) with cryptic encoded broadcasts.
